description_long: This object is a compact, antique-style shotgun with a wide, flared muzzle and a short barrel, reminiscent of a blunderbuss. The barrel is metallic, dark gray in color, and features a brass band near the muzzle and another brass fitting at the breech. The stock is made of polished wood with a rich brown hue, smoothly contoured for ergonomic handling. The action mechanism is break-action, with a prominent brass lever and a rounded, metallic trigger guard. The overall design is robust and decorative, with a blend of metallic and wooden elements that evoke a historical or steampunk aesthetic.
description: A compact, antique-style shotgun with a flared metallic barrel, brass fittings, and a polished wooden stock.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, flared muzzle and the circular opening of the barrel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the short, conical barrel, brass lever, and wooden stock.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wooden stock and the back of the action mechanism.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the break-action lever and the curvature of the stock.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, flared muzzle, no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth, continuous curve and no finger grooves
